backend_framework.rationale: Async-native, excellent OpenAPI support, strong typing with Pydantic

frontend_framework.rationale: SSR/SSG support, React ecosystem, Vercel deployment

database.rationale: ACID compliance, JSON support, mature ecosystem

api_style.rationale: Broad client compatibility, auto-generated docs and SDKs

auth_strategy.rationale: Stateless auth, works well with microservices

infra.rationale: Local dev simplicity with production-grade orchestration
